title: psoralea mexicana
intro: Psoralea mexicana, also known as Mexican knawel, is a plant species native to Mexico and the southwestern United States, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal effects. Psoralea mexicana is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and supporting bone health. Herbal preparations of Psoralea mexicana include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
